title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Location permission onboarding flow for Find My Device shows permission dialog again after granting "While Using the App" permission via Poly Lens menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
4. Reach the 'Organized' screen in the onboarding flow.
6. Tap 'Don't Allow' when the location permission dialog appears.
8. Log in or continue as Guest.
9. Open the Poly Lens menu by tapping the hamburger icon (☰).
11. Tap 'Enable Now' on the Find My Device screen.
12. Grant the Location permission by selecting 'While Using the App' option.
expected: Permission dialogs appear at appropriate steps with correct options and text. After granting location permission, the Find My Device screen is displayed with no permission window.
